# Florida Homeowners Insurance Quotes

> A free quote comparison platform and educational resource for Florida homeowners and drivers. Operated by a licensed Florida insurance agent serving all 67 Florida counties. Specializing in homeowners insurance, FR-44 filings, SR-22 filings, contractor liability, and flood insurance.

## About
- Licensed Florida Insurance Agent
- Phone: (435) 612-1009
- Location: Fort Lauderdale, FL (serving statewide)
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9am–9pm, Saturday 12pm–5pm
- Bilingual: English and Spanish

- /: Homepage — free Florida homeowners insurance quote form
